data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] cascade-circuit-breaker.sh case block no longer contains the v2 flat-file path pattern
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets/\*' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/cascade-circuit-breaker.sh

- [ ] review-stop-check.sh no longer contains grep -v filters for the v2 path
  Verify: ! grep -q "grep -v '\^\\.tickets'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh

- [ ] record-review.sh diff exclusion arrays no longer contain v2 path exclusions
  Verify: ! grep -q "':!\.tickets/'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh

- [ ] RED tests from task 014f-a652 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS'

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
